_note:
Wiki-sourced BASE build cost of each facility (the materials to construct the building before any upgrades), in raw resources. NOT in game_data exports (only RepairCost is). Keyed by facilityKey -> { resourceCodeName: quantity }. Sourced from foxhole.wiki.gg facility 'Build' sections (game version 1.65) — an explicit exception to the wiki-is-not-a-source rule (game fields simply lack it). Resource codeNames: Cloth=Basic Materials, FacilityMaterials1=Construction Materials, FacilityMaterials2=Processed Construction Materials, FacilityMaterials3=Steel Construction Materials. Consumed by src/facility-calc/mod-costs.mjs (buildingCosts sums base + each modification per used building).

NOTE: the 3 entries below are HARDCODED per user instruction (not wiki-sourced) and may drift from the live game: ConcreteMixer={Wood:75} (Refined Materials; codeName 'Wood' in this dataset), FacilityMineOilRig/Offshore Platform={FacilityMaterials1:100}, FacilityVehicleFactory3/Dry Dock={FacilityMaterials9:35}. All other entries are wiki-sourced v1.65.
